entities.name: Assessment Signal Validity Framework
entities.context: V's framework for evaluating standardized assessment utility based on three properties

entities.name: Construct Validity
entities.context: Property where the signal maps onto what you're actually measuring

entities.name: Signal Clarity
entities.context: Property of unambiguous transmission in assessment systems

entities.name: Equitable Access to Preparation
entities.context: Property ensuring fair access to test preparation resources

entities.name: Standardized Assessments
entities.context: Assessments functioning as signal transmission systems

entities.name: Epistemology
entities.context: Domain/field of knowledge theory that this framework belongs to

relationships.context: Framework belongs to the epistemology domain
Construct validity is one of three required properties
Signal clarity is one of three required properties
Equitable access is one of three required properties
Framework applies to evaluating standardized assessments
